about: Gridlabs Research Foundation is a CSR-focused organization dedicated to designing, developing, and implementing impactful Corporate Social Responsibility initiatives. We work closely with corporations, institutions, and community partners to transform CSR commitments into structured programs that create meaningful and sustainable social impact.
about2: From initial concept development and program design to implementation, monitoring, and impact assessment, Gridlabs provides end-to-end support for CSR initiatives. Our goal is to help organizations deliver programs that not only meet regulatory requirements but also create lasting value for communities.
about3: With a strong corporate network and the ability to mobilize partnerships and resources, Gridlabs facilitates collaborative initiatives that address critical social challenges across sectors such as education, healthcare, sustainability, and community development.
about4: Guided by an advisory board of distinguished professionals and supported by an experienced team working in the CSR and sustainability space, Gridlabs Research Foundation is committed to building responsible partnerships that empower communities and drive long-term social progress.
introAlt: Advisors collaborating around a colorful workspace table
mission: To design and implement impactful CSR initiatives that empower underserved communities through education, healthcare, sustainable development, and social welfare while enabling corporations to create meaningful and measurable social impact.
vision: To build a more inclusive and sustainable society by connecting corporate responsibility with community development and long-term social progress.

founder.name: Naresh Shroff
founder.bio: Naresh Shroff is a seasoned professional with over 25 years of experience in Strategic Management, Mergers & Acquisitions, Business Management, People Management, Networking, and Influencing. Throughout his distinguished career, he has collaborated with several of India’s leading industry organizations, playing a key role in shaping their acquisition strategies and business growth initiatives.
founder.bio2: His extensive industry experience, leadership capabilities, and strong professional network have been instrumental in driving impactful initiatives and building strategic partnerships across sectors.
founder.quote: As you start to walk on the way, the way appears.
founder.alt: Portrait of a thoughtful business leader

achievements: STRATEGIC VISIONARY — Naresh delivers strategic insights driving growth, profitability, and sustainable success.
M&A MAESTRO — Naresh leads high-profile M&A deals, ensuring successful, synergistic outcomes.
BUSINESS LEADER — Naresh inspires diverse teams, driving innovation, accountability, and high performance.

PEOPLE MANAGEMENT — Recognizing the importance of human capital, Naresh excels in managing and nurturing talent. His leadership has empowered teams to achieve their full potential, driving organizational success.
NETWORKING PRODIGY — Naresh leverages his extensive network to build partnerships, collaborations, and maintain valuable relationships across industries.
INFLUENCING SKILLS — Naresh’s persuasive skills drive change, rally support, and achieve objectives.
CSR ADVOCATE — A passionate CSR advocate, leading SHROFF INC to empower individuals as catalysts for meaningful societal change.

STRATEGIC CSR INITIATIVES — They’ve led impactful CSR initiatives with corporate giants, empowering communities through education, health, livelihoods, women’s upliftment, and tribal and artisan initiatives.
VERSATILE CAREER — From business to art to activism, their journey blends creativity, passion, and global-impact-driven CSR leadership.
GLOBAL REPRESENTATION — They’ve represented top global luxury real estate and entertainment firms, showcasing exceptional international business acumen.
FINANCIAL LEADERSHIP — Heading a team of senior finance professionals with backgrounds in commercial and investment banking, they have managed portfolios worth USD 1 billion.
GREENFIELD PROJECT LEADERSHIP — They have successfully led large teams in greenfield projects, building ventures from the ground up.
